title: Lagaree
description: a City building magic modpack which adds a variety of technologies and magic items
body: our previous modpacks combined with improved performace and function and trimming of unwanted fluff # wow so much stuff: aka features - custom weapons and tools, advanced smelting and tool creation - vehicles such as custom cars and flying planes - tech and magic storage systems for any kind of player - quest magic - dynamic lighting - propaganda - more food - seasons - origins # credit to vanilla tweaks for their resource packs [Vanilla Tweaks]
